TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ging bunaw u tatayna anu pakuyuckuyuc kyami hasa kanca a micakay tu cacay a ging bunawan? kya mahica u tatayna anu pakuyuckyuc hawsa ami cakay aca tu cacay a siging bunawan,caay yaca ku sacuung yaca, satu u tatayna siging bunawan sakakapah nu Pakaniay u tatayna sigibunawa, kuni u pakaniay sa hacica ku katineng nu isu, sayaway ging bunawan sakakapah nu uzip u tatengaay a ging bunawan hawsa, anu matenes tu siging bunawa kyami hawsa salengc takelal ' sumilit sa. kuyni a ging bunawan hausa ,u sakakapah nu uzip nu tatayna , kapah u kasalungan nu tatayna, ngay salunganlungan kisu. matenes siging bunawan a tatayna,a mala kakapahan salungan ku zumaay a tademaw,haymaw a satu makelup ku cu'det nu uzip. zayhan sa uini a tatenga a ging bunawan, kapah amipadang a mibakah tu lacu'say a nanum nu uzip, uzuma nama matila' nu e' pah ku ging bunawan asapikiskia tu uzip, u sasakapahay nu sapibakah tu cu'det atu nanum nu uzip. kasiging bunawan ku tatayna, siging bunawan sa a salungan satu, katuud ku cabay nasaayaway siging bunawan hawsa, siging bunawan matenes siging bunaw salumeni' sa. zayhan ging bunaw kikalitemuh tu lalabu nu uzip atu bali a ledek hawsa, amasumad yadah satu ku ledek,lumeni' satu y aging bunawan. sisa siging bunawan i lima kyamihaw sa, kapah a mipadang patahkal tu nu uzip a ledek, akapah henay miliyas tu mahiniay u sapibihun tuini a maduka ku banges, ngay a salungalungan satu kisu. sakamu sa ku ising, u ging budaw taneng sakakapah nu labuay u uzipa atay balu' sisa kasiging bunawan tu ku tatayna, kapaha sapihulak tu lahemhem mabiyalaw nu balucu' nu tatayna min, sangaleb anu kawilian a lima ku siging buwa, macapi ku balucu' amangaleb macunus ku kanamuh limulak nu balucu', siacawaay tu a tatayna, siging bunawan dada' siging bunawan sasa malakakitaan a zaked sa, anu malumeni' ya ging kina cacay ku kamu matineng tu, yu adidi u katinengan tu ging hananay a tuud u kasatima, malaki tu kya amatineng, kanahatu tatenga' u kasatiman a kiman ci niza, nika uaca acaay tu macakayay tu nu tanemaw, anu kadayu ku kenus na kazali kyam hawsa, Uyniyaca anu pina lasubu ku kalisiwama amacakay tu tatengaay a ginng tatamus satu bunawan nu lima (nika 925 ku tatengaay a ging u 92.5 kulu lasubu lima ging cunus hantu 7.5 kululasubu lima a malad), uyni u kasatatenga atu atekak nu akazali ku mahiniay). nika ciniza zayhan salungan aca dawmi' aca hawsa, a caayaca kadayum makaway , katuud tu ku tadebaw I luma' izaw tu ku pina a ging kazali, matenes satu , a maazih tu ku heni a lumeni' satu sa cay tu kalimulak ku balucu',
S.PHON: giŇč bunaw u tatajna anu pakuju ¶kuju ¶ kjami ńßasa kan ¶a a mi ¶akaj tu ¶a ¶aj a giŇč bunawan? kja mańßi ¶a u tatajna anu pakuju ¶kju ¶ ńßawsa ami ¶akaj a ¶a tu ¶a ¶aj a sigiŇč bunawan, ¶aaj ja ¶a ku sa ¶uuŇč ja ¶a, satu u tatajna sigiŇč bunawan sakakapańß nu pakaniaj u tatajna sigibunawa, kuni u pakaniaj sa ńßa ¶i ¶a ku katin…ôŇč nu isu, sajawaj giŇč bunawan sakakapańß nu uzip u tat…ôŇčaaj a giŇč bunawan ńßawsa, anu mat…ôn…ôs tu sigiŇč bunawa kjami ńßawsa sar~…ĺ…ôŇč ¶ tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ Ē~ ° sumir~…ĺit sa. kujni a giŇč bunawan ńßausa ,u sakakapańß nu uzip nu tatajna , kapańß u kasar~…ĺuŇčan nu tatajna, Ňčaj sar~…ĺuŇčanr~…ĺuŇčan kisu. mat…ôn…ôs sigiŇč bunawan a tatajna,a mar~…ĺa kakapańßan sar~…ĺuŇčan ku zumaaj a tad…ômaw,ńßajmaw a satu mak…ôr~…ĺup ku ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt nu uzip. zajńßan sa uini a tat…ôŇča a giŇč bunawan, kapańß amipadaŇč a mibakańß tu r~…ĺa ¶u Ē~ °saj a nanum nu uzip, uzuma nama matir~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu …ô Ē~ ° pańß ku giŇč bunawan asapikiskia tu uzip, u sasakapańßaj nu sapibakańß tu ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt atu nanum nu uzip. kasigiŇč bunawan ku tatajna, sigiŇč bunawan sa a sar~…ĺuŇčan satu, katuud ku ¶abaj nasaajawaj sigiŇč bunawan ńßawsa, sigiŇč bunawan mat…ôn…ôs sigiŇč bunaw sar~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° sa. zajńßan giŇč bunaw kikar~…ĺit…ômuńß tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu uzip atu bar~…ĺi a r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ńßawsa, amasumad jadańß satu ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk,r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° satu j agiŇč bunawan. sisa sigiŇč bunawan i r~…ĺima kjamińßaw sa, kapańß a mipadaŇč patańßkar~…ĺ tu nu uzip a r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, akapańß ńß…ônaj mir~…ĺijas tu mańßiniaj u sapibińßun tuini a maduka ku baŇč…ôs, Ňčaj a sar~…ĺuŇčar~…ĺuŇčan satu kisu. sakamu sa ku isiŇč, u giŇč budaw tan…ôŇč sakakapańß nu r~…ĺabuaj u uzipa ataj bar~…ĺu Ē~ ° sisa kasigiŇč bunawan tu ku tatajna, kapańßa sapińßur~…ĺak tu r~…ĺańß…ômńß…ôm mabijar~…ĺaw nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tatajna min, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb anu kawir~…ĺian a r~…ĺima ku sigiŇč buwa, ma ¶api ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° amaŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ma ¶unus ku kanamuńß r~…ĺimur~…ĺak nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sia ¶awaaj tu a tatajna, sigiŇč bunawan dada Ē~ ° sigiŇč bunawan sasa mar~…ĺakakitaan a zak…ôd sa, anu mar~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ja giŇč kina ¶a ¶aj ku kamu matin…ôŇč tu, ju adidi u katin…ôŇčan tu giŇč ńßananaj a tuud u kasatima, mar~…ĺaki tu kja amatin…ôŇč, kanańßatu tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° u kasatiman a kiman ¶i niza, nika ua ¶a a ¶aaj tu ma ¶akajaj tu nu tan…ômaw, anu kadaju ku k…ônus na kazar~…ĺi kjam ńßawsa, ujnija ¶a anu pina r~…ĺasubu ku kar~…ĺisiwama ama ¶akaj tu tat…ôŇčaaj a ginŇč tatamus satu bunawan nu r~…ĺima (nika *** ku tat…ôŇčaaj a giŇč u **.* kur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima giŇč ¶unus ńßantu *.* kur~…ĺur~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a mar~…ĺad), ujni u kasatat…ôŇča atu at…ôkak nu akazar~…ĺi ku mańßiniaj). nika ¶iniza zajńßan sar~…ĺuŇčan a ¶a dawmi Ē~ ° a ¶a ńßawsa, a ¶aaja ¶a kadajum makawaj , katuud tu ku tad…ôbaw i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° izaw tu ku pina a giŇč kazar~…ĺi, mat…ôn…ôs satu , a maazińß tu ku ńß…ôni a r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° satu sa ¶aj tu kar~…ĺimur~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,
S.FORM: ging bunaw u tatayna anu pakuyuckuyuc kyami hasa kanca a micakay tu cacay a ging bunawan? kya mahica u tatayna anu pakuyuckyuc hawsa ami cakay aca tu cacay a siging bunawan,caay yaca ku sacuung yaca, satu u tatayna siging bunawan sakakapah nu Pakaniay u tatayna sigibunawa, kuni u pakaniay sa hacica ku katineng nu isu, sayaway ging bunawan sakakapah nu uzip u tatengaay a ging bunawan hawsa, anu matenes tu siging bunawa kyami hawsa salengc takelal ' sumilit sa. kuyni a ging bunawan hausa ,u sakakapah nu uzip nu tatayna , kapah u kasalungan nu tatayna, ngay salunganlungan kisu. matenes siging bunawan a tatayna,a mala kakapahan salungan ku zumaay a tademaw,haymaw a satu makelup ku cu'det nu uzip. zayhan sa uini a tatenga a ging bunawan, kapah amipadang a mibakah tu lacu'say a nanum nu uzip, uzuma nama matila' nu e' pah ku ging bunawan asapikiskia tu uzip, u sasakapahay nu sapibakah tu cu'det atu nanum nu uzip. kasiging bunawan ku tatayna, siging bunawan sa a salungan satu, katuud ku cabay nasaayaway siging bunawan hawsa, siging bunawan matenes siging bunaw salumeni' sa. zayhan ging bunaw kikalitemuh tu lalabu nu uzip atu bali a ledek hawsa, amasumad yadah satu ku ledek,lumeni' satu y aging bunawan. sisa siging bunawan i lima kyamihaw sa, kapah a mipadang patahkal tu nu uzip a ledek, akapah henay miliyas tu mahiniay u sapibihun tuini a maduka ku banges, ngay a salungalungan satu kisu. sakamu sa ku ising, u ging budaw taneng sakakapah nu labuay u uzipa atay balu' sisa kasiging bunawan tu ku tatayna, kapaha sapihulak tu lahemhem mabiyalaw nu balucu' nu tatayna min, sangaleb anu kawilian a lima ku siging buwa, macapi ku balucu' amangaleb macunus ku kanamuh limulak nu balucu', siacawaay tu a tatayna, siging bunawan dada' siging bunawan sasa malakakitaan a zaked sa, anu malumeni' ya ging kina cacay ku kamu matineng tu, yu adidi u katinengan tu ging hananay a tuud u kasatima, malaki tu kya amatineng, kanahatu tatenga' u kasatiman a kiman ci niza, nika uaca acaay tu macakayay tu nu tanemaw, anu kadayu ku kenus na kazali kyam hawsa, Uyniyaca anu pina lasubu ku kalisiwama amacakay tu tatengaay a ginng tatamus satu bunawan nu lima (nika 925 ku tatengaay a ging u 92.5 kulu lasubu lima ging cunus hantu 7.5 kululasubu lima a malad), uyni u kasatatenga atu atekak nu akazali ku mahiniay). nika ciniza zayhan salungan aca dawmi' aca hawsa, a caayaca kadayum makaway , katuud tu ku tadebaw I luma' izaw tu ku pina a ging kazali, matenes satu , a maazih tu ku heni a lumeni' satu sa cay tu kalimulak ku balucu',

ja ¶a ku sa ¶uuŇč ja ¶a, satu u tatajna sigiŇč bunawan sakakapańß nu pakaniaj u tatajna sigibunawa, kuni u pakaniaj sa ńßa ¶i ¶a ku katin…ôŇč nu isu, sajawaj giŇč bunawan sakakapańß nu uzip u tat…ôŇčaaj a giŇč bunawan ńßawsa, anu mat…ôn…ôs tu sigiŇč bunawa kjami ńßawsa sar~…ĺ…ôŇč ¶ tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ Ē~ ° sumir~…ĺit sa. kujni a giŇč bunawan ńßausa ,u sakakapańß nu uzip nu tatajna , kapańß u kasar~…ĺuŇčan nu tatajna, Ňčaj sar~…ĺuŇčanr~…ĺuŇčan kisu. mat…ôn…ôs sigiŇč bunawan a tatajna,a mar~…ĺa kakapańßan sar~…ĺuŇčan ku zumaaj a tad…ômaw,ńßajmaw a satu mak…ôr~…ĺup ku ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt nu uzip. zajńßan sa uini a tat…ôŇča a giŇč bunawan, kapańß amipadaŇč a mibakańß tu r~…ĺa ¶u Ē~ °saj a nanum nu uzip, uzuma nama matir~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu …ô Ē~ ° pańß ku giŇč bunawan asapikiskia tu uzip, u sasakapańßaj nu sapibakańß tu ¶u Ē~ °d…ôt atu nanum nu uzip. kasigiŇč bunawan ku tatajna, sigiŇč bunawan sa a sar~…ĺuŇčan satu, katuud ku ¶abaj nasaajawaj sigiŇč bunawan ńßawsa, sigiŇč bunawan mat…ôn…ôs sigiŇč bunaw sar~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° sa. zajńßan giŇč bunaw kikar~…ĺit…ômuńß tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu uzip atu bar~…ĺi a r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk ńßawsa, amasumad jadańß satu ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk,r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° satu j agiŇč bunawan. sisa sigiŇč bunawan i r~…ĺima kjamińßaw sa, kapańß a mipadaŇč patańßkar~…ĺ tu nu uzip a r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, akapańß ńß…ônaj mir~…ĺijas tu mańßiniaj u sapibińßun tuini a maduka ku baŇč…ôs, Ňčaj a sar~…ĺuŇčar~…ĺuŇčan satu kisu. sakamu sa ku isiŇč, u giŇč budaw tan…ôŇč sakakapańß nu r~…ĺabuaj u uzipa ataj bar~…ĺu Ē~ ° sisa kasigiŇč bunawan tu ku tatajna, kapańßa sapińßur~…ĺak tu r~…ĺańß…ômńß…ôm mabijar~…ĺaw nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tatajna min, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb anu kawir~…ĺian a r~…ĺima ku sigiŇč buwa, ma ¶api ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° amaŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ma ¶unus ku kanamuńß r~…ĺimur~…ĺak nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sia ¶awaaj tu a tatajna, sigiŇč bunawan dada Ē~ ° sigiŇč bunawan sasa mar~…ĺakakitaan a zak…ôd sa, anu mar~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ja giŇč kina ¶a ¶aj ku kamu matin…ôŇč tu, ju adidi u katin…ôŇčan tu giŇč ńßananaj a tuud u kasatima, mar~…ĺaki tu kja amatin…ôŇč, kanańßatu tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° u kasatiman a kiman ¶i niza, nika ua ¶a a ¶aaj tu ma ¶akajaj tu nu tan…ômaw, anu kadaju ku k…ônus na kazar~…ĺi kjam ńßawsa, ujnija ¶a anu pina r~…ĺasubu ku kar~…ĺisiwama ama ¶akaj tu tat…ôŇčaaj a ginŇč tatamus satu bunawan nu r~…ĺima (nika *** ku tat…ôŇčaaj a giŇč u **.* kur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima giŇč ¶unus ńßantu *.* kur~…ĺur~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a mar~…ĺad), ujni u kasatat…ôŇča atu at…ôkak nu akazar~…ĺi ku mańßiniaj). nika ¶iniza zajńßan sar~…ĺuŇčan a ¶a dawmi Ē~ ° a ¶a ńßawsa, a ¶aaja ¶a kadajum makawaj , katuud tu ku tad…ôbaw i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° izaw tu ku pina a giŇč kazar~…ĺi, mat…ôn…ôs satu , a maazińß tu ku ńß…ôni a r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° satu sa ¶aj tu kar~…ĺimur~…ĺak ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °,
